name: Chewy Oatmeal Raisin Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Light brown sugar, firmly packed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease cookie sheets.
3. In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, and nutmeg. Stir until well mixed.
4. In another large mixing bowl, combine oatmeal, sugar, brown sugar, raisins, oil, egg, and milk. Stir until well mixed.
5. Using a super full teaspoon, measure out dough and place mounds about 2 inches apart on the prepared sheets.
6. Wet fingers and press each cookie down just a little.
7. Bake for 8-10 minutes or until lightly browned on top.
